sections.paragraph:
verb לערוך

to arrange; edit; set

verb להיערך

to prepare, make arrangements; be arranged; be held, waged; be edited; set; be estimated, valued

verb להעריך

to estimate, value; appreciate, esteem, regard highly; admire very much; be greatful; recognize with appreciation; criticize, comment; appreciate, esteem

verb הוערך

be estimated, valued; be appreciated, esteemed

masculine noun

value, price, worth, merit, importance, moment, worthiness, denomination

masculine noun

asset, property

masculine noun

entry, headword
